package repository

import (
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Anti-pattern: The same ad hoc scope function is defined inline multiple times
// instead of being extracted into a reusable named scope.

type Article struct {
	ID        uint   `gorm:"primaryKey"`
	Title     string `gorm:"column:title"`
	Published bool   `gorm:"column:published"`
	DeletedAt string `gorm:"column:deleted_at"`
}

type ArticleRepository struct {
	db *gorm.DB
}

func (r *ArticleRepository) FindByID(id uint) ([]Article, error) {
	var articles []Article
	err := r.db.Scopes(func(d *gorm.DB) *gorm.DB {
		return d.Where("deleted_at IS NULL")
	}).Where("id = ?", id).Find(&articles).Error
	return articles, err
}

func (r *ArticleRepository) FindByTitle(title string) ([]Article, error) {
	var articles []Article
	err := r.db.Scopes(func(d *gorm.DB) *gorm.DB {
		return d.Where("deleted_at IS NULL")
	}).Where("title LIKE ?", "%"+title+"%").Find(&articles).Error
	return articles, err
}

func (r *ArticleRepository) FindPublished() ([]Article, error) {
	var articles []Article
	err := r.db.Scopes(func(d *gorm.DB) *gorm.DB {
		return d.Where("deleted_at IS NULL")
	}).Where("published = ?", true).Find(&articles).Error
	return articles, err
}
